data.title: Web2 is failing vertical farms — they need DePIN to survive
data.description:
Vertical farming can solve the global food crisis, but traditional funding models fail. Web3 and DePINs offer a lifeline, enabling transparency, traceability and scalable growth for this critical industry.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/web2-is-failing-vertical-farms?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Appoints Hsiao-Wei Wang and Tomasz Stańczak as Co-Executive Directors
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation announced the appointment of Hsiao-Wei Wang and Tomasz Stańczak as co-executive directors to continue supporting the growing Ethereum ecosystem. The Ethereum Foundation announced that under the leadership of Hsiao-Wei and Tomasz, it will ensure that Ethereum and the ecosystem can grow while ensuring that this growth can promote the core values ​​of Ethereum, such as open source, permissionless global collaboration, privacy and security.

data.title: US Banks’ Unrealized Losses Explode by $118,400,000,000 in Three Months As FDIC Declares 66 Banks on ‘Problem List’
data.description:

data.title: Bitlayer announces strategic partnership with Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network to promote BitVM Bridge integration and BTCFi development
data.description:
Bitlayer, the Bitcoin second-layer ecological team, announced a strategic partnership with five public chains and protocols including Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network to promote the integrated deployment of BitVM Bridge and the integration of ecological protocols, provide users with a secure and highly scalable multi-chain experience of BTC assets, and unlock trillions of dollars of liquidity from the Bitcoin ecosystem for Base, Starknet, Arbitrum, Sonic and Plume Network ecosystems.
BitVM Bridge is a trust-minimized BTC bridge developed by Bitlayer, with high security, support for native returns and programmability. Currently, Bitlayer BitVM Bridge has been launched on the test network, supporting users to log in to test and experience functions such as Mint, Unmint and Reclaim. In the future, Bitlayer BitVM Bridge will open cooperation with more public chains and DeFi protocols to jointly unleash the potential of Bitcoin as a dynamic financial tool.
